prestazioni: 1JZ-GTE VVT-i engine swap with forged internals: CP Pistons 87mm forged slugs (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 264°/264° camshaft kit with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise VVT-i timing. Paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS Hi-Power.

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken, featuring a 70mm titanium muffler and equal-length 4-2-1 headers with 1.75-inch primaries. The system is tuned for a 3,500 RPM powerband peak with a 7,800 RPM redline, utilizing a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone for boost control and traction management.

KW Variant 3 coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable top mounts, and custom valving for the JZX100’s multi-link rear suspension. Paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, polyurethane bushings by Whiteline, and a Cusco Type RS 2-way LSD (1.5-way front, 2-way rear) for optimal power delivery and chassis rigidity.
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and a Rocket Bunny-style front bumper lip with integrated LED turn signals. The rear features a custom carbon fiber duckbill spoiler by Seibon, matched with a 3M Matte Pearl White wrap and blacked-out JDM-spec Toyota emblems.

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +15 front and 17x10.5 +25 rear wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires. The setup includes custom extended wheel studs by Project Kics and titanium lug nuts by Muteki for weight savings and a flush fitment.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JZX100-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel with a Works Bell quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower bolted to the factory chassis points. The rear seats are replaced with a carbon fiber storage panel by Varis, housing a custom 3-inch exhaust resonator delete for a deeper tone.
